3.1 TOTAL CONTRACT VALUE
The total compensation for all services described in this Agreement is ONE THOUSAND DOLLARS ($1,000.00 USD).
3.2 PAYMENT STRUCTURE
Payment shall be made in three (3) milestone payments as follows:
PAYMENT 1: $500.00 USD (50% of Total Contract Value)

    Due Date: Upon execution of this Contract and BEFORE project commencement
    Payment Deadline: Within three (3) business days of contract execution
    Triggers Project Start: YES - Project does NOT commence until this payment clears

PAYMENT 2: $300.00 USD (30% of Total Contract Value)

    Due Date: Upon completion of Milestone 2 (Website Development Phase)
    Payment Deadline: Within five (5) business days of Developer's invoice
    Triggers Next Phase: YES - Milestone 3 does NOT commence until this payment clears

PAYMENT 3: $200.00 USD (20% of Total Contract Value)

    Due Date: Upon successful website launch (Milestone 4 completion)
    Payment Deadline: Within five (5) business days of Developer's invoice
    Triggers: Final file handover and close of project

3.3 CRITICAL PAYMENT PROVISIONS
A. NO WORK WITHOUT PAYMENT:
    THE DEVELOPER SHALL NOT BE OBLIGATED TO COMMENCE ANY WORK OR PROCEED TO THE NEXT MILESTONE UNTIL THE APPLICABLE MILESTONE PAYMENT HAS BEEN RECEIVED AND CLEARED IN THE DEVELOPER'S ACCOUNT. THIS IS A MATERIAL TERM OF THIS AGREEMENT.
B. Project Commencement:
    The Developer shall not begin ANY work on this project until Payment 1 ($500.00 USD) has been received and cleared
    Receipt of payment means funds are available and cleared in Developer's bank account (not merely sent or pending)
    The Project Commencement Date is determined ONLY after payment clears, not when payment is initiated

3.4 PAYMENT METHODS
   Acceptable payment methods include:
   Bank wire transfer (international)
   PayPal (Client pays any associated fees)
   Credit card via Stripe (Client pays processing fees if applicable)
   Wise (formerly TransferWise)
   Other methods as mutually agreed in writing

3.5 CURRENCY AND EXCHANGE RATES
All payments shall be made in United States Dollars (USD). If Client pays in a different currency, the exchange rate shall be the mid-market rate published by XE.com on the date payment is received, and Client shall bear any currency conversion fees or unfavorable rate differences.
3.6 LATE PAYMENT PENALTIES
A. Late Fee Assessment:
If any milestone payment is not received within the specified deadline:

   Days 1-7 overdue: Grace period, friendly reminder sent
   Days 8-14 overdue: 5% late fee assessed on outstanding amount
   Days 15-30 overdue: Additional 10% late fee (15% total)
   Over 30 days overdue: Additional 10% late fee (25% total) + right to suspend work

B. Interest on Overdue Amounts:
Overdue amounts shall accrue interest at the rate of 1.5% per month (18% per annum) or the maximum rate permitted by applicable law, whichever is less, calculated from the due date until payment is received.
C. Work Suspension:
The Developer reserves the right to suspend all work on the project if any payment is more than fourteen (14) days overdue. During suspension:

   No work shall be performed
   Timeline shall be extended for the duration of suspension plus 50%
   Already-completed work shall not be delivered until payment is received
   Client shall not have access to staging environments or work in progress

D. Collections and Legal Fees:
If Developer must engage collection services or legal action to recover overdue payments, Client shall be responsible for:

   All reasonable attorney's fees
   Court costs and filing fees
   Collection agency fees
   Interest on overdue amounts
   Any other costs incurred in collection efforts

3.7 NON-REFUNDABLE PAYMENTS
   All milestone payments are non-refundable once the work for that milestone has commenced, except as specifically provided in Article VIII (Termination).
   Payment 1: Non-refundable once project begins (design work started)
   Payment 2: Non-refundable once development phase begins
   Payment 3: Non-refundable once launch preparation begins

3.8 TAXES
A. Client Responsibility:
   Client is responsible for all applicable taxes in their jurisdiction, including but not limited to:
   Sales tax
   Use tax
   Value Added Tax (VAT)
   Goods and Services Tax (GST)
   Withholding tax

B. Developer Responsibility:

SCOPE OF WORK TO BE RENDERED

A. SOIL TREATMENT (ST)
To prevent subterranean termites from damaging your home/building, we treat the soil around by cordoning, trenching or injection methods using MONSTER BUG PEST CONTROL effective F3D Insect Growth Regulator. F3D IGR contains not only time-tested persistent termiticides but also patented household IGR concentrate (Pat. 16556) and organic lignin material 9Pat. 13155) which long-lastingly bonds the F3D IGR with the soil creating an uninhabitable environment for subterranean termites.

Frequency of Service: One (1) General Treatment Only

B. DRILLING
Using heavy duty-drills for cemented areas and soil injectors for compacted soil, we can inject F3D IGR deep under the surface to penetrate the hidden areas so susceptible to subterranean termites thus giving you a greater protection package.

Frequency of Service: Optional

C. WOOD DRENCHING (WD)
With this service, we treat all infested parts of the building/or homes, concentrating on floors, walls, cracks, ceilings and crevices, by direct spraying of F3D IGR to control surface infestations and help minimize further infestation. F3D IGR mixed in either kerosene, turpentine, varnish, diesel oil can be used as wood preservative. F3D IGR is effective against wood rot.

Frequency of Service: One (1) General Treatment Only

D. TERMITE ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (TAMP)
If your home is termite-infested, there’s nothing like a regular termite check-up. During this monthly or quarterly visits, our licensed technician inspects all crevices, surfaces corners, and places conducive to termite attack. He treats any signs of infestation by dusting or trophallaxis method, wood injection, residual spraying or other similar techniques using F3 Powder and/or F3D IGR when needed. Regular TAMP inspections and treatments minimize the possibility of an infestation by dry and damp wood termites as well as by subterranean termites.
Frequency of Service: One (1) General Treatment & Monthly Monitoring Service & Maintenances

E.GENERAL PEST ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (GPAMP)
For effective control and/ or prevention of all flying and crawling urban pests such as mosquitoes, houseflies, cockroaches, ants, bedbugs among others inside and immediately outside of the premises, a GPAMP service is hereby recommended to be done GPAMP service may come in the form of either spraying, misting, painting or brushing on infested surface areas with our exclusively formulated Household Insecticide (HI). GPAMP treatment is for effective control of disease transmitting both flying and crawling and household commercial pests such as cockroaches, mosquitoes, flies, ants, bedbugs, etc.

Frequency of Service: (n/a)

E..RAT ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (RAMP)
This covers the control of all species of rodents either by the installation of exclusive Patented products. Most effective for this is Encapsulated Zinc Phosphide concentrate (EZP). One EZP teabag mixed with one (1) cup leftover foods and wrapped like candies, will make 8 to 10 baits or ready to use baits. This bait will be placed in strategic and inconspicuous areas in your building/home. Installation of Patented Devices (mechanical) such as Rat Trap and Mouse Trap or special rat glue may be employed. C. WOOD DRENCHING (WD)
With this service, we treat all infested parts of the building/or homes, concentrating on floors, walls, cracks, ceilings and crevices, by direct spraying of to control surface infestations and help minimize further infestations. Frequency of Service: One (1) General Treatment Only

D. TERMITE ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (TAMP)
If your home is termite-infested, there’s nothing like a regular termite check-up. During this monthly or quarterly visits, our licensed technician inspects all crevices, surfaces corners, and places conducive to termite attack. He treats any signs of infestation by dusting or trophallaxis method, wood injection, residual spraying or other similar techniques using Termite Powder and/Foam/Exterminex Bait when needed. Regular TAMP inspections and treatments minimize the possibility of an infestation by dry and damp wood termites as well as by subterranean termites. Frequency of Service: One (1) General Treatment & Service Maintenances

E. MOUND DEMOLITION
Termite mounds are the homes of subterranean termites where the termite queens live and lay eggs. Our team will search for these termite mounds, destroy them and thoroughly treat the surrounding areas.

F. GENERAL PEST ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (GPAMP)
For effective control and/ or prevention of all flying and crawling urban pests such as mosquitoes, houseflies, cockroaches, ants, bedbugs among others inside and immediately outside of the premises, a GPAMP service is hereby recommended to be done GPAMP service may come in the form of either spraying, misting, painting or brushing on infested surface areas with our Insecticide. GPAMP treatment is for effective control of disease transmitting both flying and crawling and household commercial pests such as cockroaches, mosquitoes, flies, ants, bedbugs, etc. Frequency of Service: ONCE A MONTH SERVICE

G. RAT ABATEMENT MAINTENANCE PROGRAM (RAMP)
This covers the control of all species of rodents either by the installations of baits. This bait will be placed in strategic and inconspicuous areas in your building/home. Installation of Patented Devices (mechanical) such as Rat Trap and Mouse Trap or special rat glue may be employed. These devices are handy and very effective mechanical control methods. This trap will be placed at strategic areas of your building/homes. Caption:
💰📱 Design Showdown: Financial Tracker Mobile App Frameworks! 📱💰

Hey Virtual Assistant 101 PH community! 👋

We're diving into the world of app design today, and we want YOUR insights! We're comparing two popular frameworks for building a financial tracker mobile application. 

Framework A: Flutter
- Pros:
  - Cross-platform compatibility (iOS & Android)
  - Fast development with hot reload
  - Rich UI components for a visually appealing app
- Cons:
  - Larger app size
  - Limited libraries compared to native frameworks

Framework B: React Native
- Pros:
  - Strong community support and resources
  - Reusable components for faster development
  - Lower memory usage and performance optimization
- Cons:
  - Requires bridging for native modules
  - UI may vary between platforms

🧐 Which framework do you think is better suited for a financial tracker app?

- Add visuals or infographics comparing the frameworks for a more engaging post.

Content Goal: Educate the audience on the importance of using SEO auditing software for increasing website traffic and conversions.

Platform: Blog Post / Social Media Post

Caption:
🔍 Why SEO Auditing Software is Essential for Boosting Your Website Traffic! 🚀

If you want your website to attract visitors and convert them into clients, implementing a robust SEO strategy is crucial. One of the most effective ways to enhance your SEO efforts is by using SEO auditing software. Here’s why it’s a game-changer for your online presence:

1. Identify Technical Issues: SEO auditing tools help uncover technical problems that could hinder your website’s performance, such as broken links, slow loading speeds, and improper redirects. Fixing these issues ensures a smoother user experience, leading to higher engagement.

2. Optimize Content: Auditing software analyzes your website’s content for SEO best practices. It checks for keyword usage, content quality, and relevance, helping you enhance your content strategy. By optimizing your content, you can better meet your audience’s needs and improve your search engine rankings.

3. Track Competitor Performance: Understanding what your competitors are doing can provide valuable insights. SEO auditing tools allow you to analyze competitor performance, revealing their strengths and weaknesses. This information helps you identify opportunities to outperform them in search results.

4. Monitor Backlinks: Backlinks play a significant role in SEO. Auditing software tracks your backlink profile, helping you understand which links are valuable and which may be harmful. Maintaining a healthy backlink profile improves your website’s authority and credibility.

5. Measure SEO Performance: Regular audits allow you to track your SEO performance over time. By monitoring key metrics, you can assess the effectiveness of your strategies and make data-driven decisions to improve your website’s visibility.

6. Increase Conversion Rates: Ultimately, the goal is to convert visitors into clients. By optimizing your website’s SEO, you enhance your chances of attracting targeted traffic. Higher-quality traffic means more potential customers who are interested in your products or services.

In summary, using SEO auditing software is vital for ensuring your website gets the traffic it needs to succeed. By identifying issues, optimizing content, and monitoring performance, you can significantly increase your chances of converting users into loyal clients.

Ready to elevate your website’s performance? Start using SEO auditing software today! 💻✨

CTA: Have you tried any SEO auditing tools? Share your experiences in the comments below!

Caption:
🌟 Exciting Learning Journey Ahead! 🌟

I’m diving deep into the world of AI Operationalization, focusing on MLOps and LLMOps! 🤖✨

Content Goal: Educate the audience on the importance of digital infrastructure for businesses.

Platform: Blog Post / Social Media Post

Caption:
🌐 Why Digital Infrastructure is Essential for Business Success! 🚀

In today's fast-paced digital world, having a robust digital infrastructure is no longer optional; it's a necessity for businesses of all sizes. Here’s why investing in digital infrastructure is crucial for your business:

1. Enhanced Efficiency: A strong digital infrastructure streamlines operations, automating processes that save time and reduce human error. This efficiency allows teams to focus on strategic initiatives rather than mundane tasks.

2. Improved Collaboration: Digital tools facilitate seamless communication and collaboration among team members, regardless of their location. This flexibility fosters a more connected workforce and enhances productivity.

3. Data Management and Security: With the right digital infrastructure, businesses can manage their data more effectively. This includes secure storage, backup solutions, and compliance with regulations, protecting sensitive information from breaches.

4. Scalability: As your business grows, so do your digital needs. A solid digital infrastructure allows for easy scaling of resources, ensuring that you can adapt to changing market demands without disruption.

5. Customer Experience: Today’s consumers expect a streamlined, personalized experience. A well-established digital infrastructure supports customer relationship management (CRM) systems, enabling businesses to understand and meet customer needs more effectively.

6. Competitive Advantage: Businesses with a robust digital infrastructure can respond faster to market changes and innovate more effectively. This agility gives them an edge over competitors who may still rely on outdated systems.

7. Cost Savings: Investing in digital infrastructure can lead to significant cost savings over time. By reducing operational inefficiencies and leveraging cloud solutions, businesses can lower their overhead and improve profitability.

In conclusion, digital infrastructure is the backbone of modern business operations. By prioritizing it, you position your business for success in an increasingly digital economy. 

Are you ready to invest in your business's future? Start building a strong digital infrastructure today! 💼✨ 

CTA: What digital tools or infrastructure have made a difference in your business? Share your experiences in the comments!

Content Goal: Share personal experience and seek advice on managing work expectations with clients while ensuring fair compensation.

Platform: Facebook Group / LinkedIn / Reddit

Caption:
🌟 Seeking Your Opinions on Client Expectations and Compensation 🌟

Hello everyone! I’d love to hear your thoughts on a situation I’m currently navigating. 

I was hired by a US client at $5 per hour, and I’ve been working on producing outputs for their team. I’m on my 4th day now. Here’s a bit of context:

- Day 1: Work was okay, starting at 6 AM as agreed so we could communicate while he’s at the office.
- Days 2 & 3: I put in nearly 10 hours each day because I was trying to meet their output standards, which I initially struggled with. I take some responsibility for not aligning my work with their expectations sooner.

Now, my question is: Is it normal for the client to expect me to complete parts of the project and submit them before he wakes up, especially when it pushes my hours beyond the agreed 8 hours? Also, there’s no overtime pay for these extra hours.

I’m concerned about being undervalued in this situation. How can I ensure that my time and effort are respected moving forward?

Caption:
🌐 Why Every Full Stack App Needs a Developer Operations Center 🚀

Building a full stack application is an exciting journey, but it comes with its challenges. That’s why having a Developer Operations Center (DevOps Center) is essential!

1️⃣ Error Tracking: A dedicated center allows you to monitor and track errors in real-time, ensuring swift resolutions and minimizing downtime.

2️⃣ Application Run-Time Logs: Keeping detailed logs helps in debugging and analyzing performance, giving you insights into how your app is functioning under different conditions.

3️⃣ API Endpoints: By creating API endpoints to communicate with external applications like Slack, you keep stakeholders informed and engaged, enhancing collaboration and transparency.

A well-structured DevOps Center not only streamlines development but also improves overall application performance and stakeholder satisfaction. Don't overlook this crucial component in your app development strategy! 

DevOps FullStackDevelopment ApplicationMonitoring APIs SoftwareDevelopment TechEfficiency

childNodes.textContent:
Facebook Group Post:

🚀 n8n Terminal Workflow Management - Complete Setup Guide 🚀

Hello everyone! 🌟 

I wanted to share a comprehensive guide on setting up and managing workflows using n8n through the terminal. This is a complete documentation for running n8n with Docker, n8n-cli, and terminal-based workflow management. 

📅 Last Updated: 2026-01-18  
📁 Location: ~/Desktop/Notes/n8n-documentations

 Quick Start:
- Daily Usage: Start the n8n environment with:  
  `~/Desktop/Notes/n8n-documentations/start-n8n.sh`

 First Time Setup:
1. Navigate to documentation:  
   `cd ~/Desktop/Notes/n8n-documentations`
2. Run startup script:  
   `./start-n8n.sh`
3. Follow prompts for authentication (first time only).

 Overview:
This setup enables terminal-based n8n workflow management without using the web interface.

 Key Components:
- n8n (Docker): Automation platform running on port 5678.
- n8n-cli: Command-line tool for workflow management.
- Workflow Templates: Ready-to-use workflow JSON files.
- Startup Scripts: Automated initialization on computer boot.

 Benefits:
- Terminal-based workflow management
- No web interface required for daily operations
- CI/CD ready
- Automated startup scripts
- Full CRUD operations via CLI
- Quick aliases for common operations

 Docker Setup:
- Start n8n Docker Container:
  - Create data volume for persistence:  
    `docker volume create n8n_data`
  - Run n8n container:  
    ```bash
    docker run -d \
      --restart always \
      --name n8n \
      -p 5678:5678 \
      -e GENERIC_TIMEZONE="UTC" \
      -e TZ="UTC" \
      -e N8N_ENFORCE_SETTINGS_FILE_PERMISSIONS=true \
      -e N8N_RUNNERS_ENABLED=true \
      -v n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n \
      docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n
    ```

 Common Docker Management Commands:
- Start n8n: `docker start n8n`
- Stop n8n: `docker stop n8n`
- Restart n8n: `docker restart n8n`
- View logs: `docker logs n8n`
- Check status: `docker ps | grep n8n`

 n8n-CLI Installation:
- Install n8n-cli Globally:  
  `npm install -g n8n-cli`
- Verify installation:  
  `n8n --version`

 Authenticate with n8n Instance:
- Get Your API Key: Create an admin account and copy the generated API key.
- Login:  
  `n8n auth login -H http://localhost:5678 -k YOUR_API_KEY`
- Verify authentication:  
  `n8n auth status`
  
 Shell Configuration Quick Setup:
- Add to your shell config:  
  ```bash
  cat >> ~/.bashrc << 'EOF'
   n8n Terminal Environment
  source ~/Desktop/Notes/n8n-documentations/shell-config.sh
  EOF
  ```
- Reload shell:  
  `source ~/.bashrc`

 Available Aliases:
- Workflow Management:
  - `n8n-list`: List all workflows
  - `n8n-create <file>`: Create workflow from file
  - `n8n-activate <id>`: Activate workflow (use --force)
  
- Docker Management:
  - `n8n-start`: Start n8n container
  - `n8n-stop`: Stop n8n container

 Workflow Creation:
1. Use a template:  
   `n8n-use-template simple-schedule.json my-workflow.json`
2. Edit the workflow:  
   `vim my-workflow.json`
3. Validate workflow:  
   `n8n-validate my-workflow.json`
4. Create workflow:  
   `n8n-create my-workflow.json`
5. Activate workflow:  
   `n8n-activate <WORKFLOW_ID> --force`

 Quick Reference n8n-CLI Commands:
- Workflows: 
  - `n8n workflows list`: List all workflows
  - `n8n workflows activate --ids <id>`: Activate workflow

This can be run through Gemini, Claude, and OpenCode CLI, but highly recommend using Code since you have a lot of free tokens.

Feel free to dive into the documentation and enhance your workflow management skills with n8n! If you have any questions, don’t hesitate to ask! 💻✨
